# Daily Stock Picks

**AI-powered equity research — updated every morning at 8am CDT**

A daily shortlist of 10 undervalued stocks with strong future potential, ranked by growth, quality, and valuation.

## How to use this
- Browse the picks below by date
- Each report scores stocks on: **Growth** (revenue CAGR, EPS) · **Quality** (margins, FCF) · **Valuation** (P/E vs. history, PEG ratio)
- Conviction levels: HIGH · MEDIUM · SPECULATIVE
